top_signals.title: How Insurance Coverage Enhancements Can Help Fleets Navigate Risk and Control Costs
top_signals.summary:
Progressive Commercial, the nation’s No. 1 truck insurer from S&P Global Market Intelligence 2025 national written premium data, and with more than 50 years of experience in the space, has built its products around the principle of matching coverage to the specific risk profile of each customer, rather than selling one-size-fits-all policies.

The post How Insurance Coverage Enhancements Can Help Fleets Navigate Risk and Control Costs appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index falls to 2871 down 4 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Monday, July 8 2026, the Baltic Dry Index decreased by 4 points, reaching 2871 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry ...
